_meta.description: GridRush puzzle collection. Each puzzle has a 9x9 Sudoku grid (0 = empty) and optional variant constraints.

even_odd._comment: Cells that must be EVEN (squares) or ODD (circles). Row/col are 0-indexed.

kropki._comment: Black dot = one value is exactly double the other. White dot = values are consecutive.

thermo._comment: Digits must strictly increase from bulb (first cell) to tip (last cell).

killer._comment: Each cage has a target sum. Digits cannot repeat within a cage.

arrow._comment: Digits on the arrow cells must sum to the digit in the circle cell.

grid._comment: 9x9 grid. Sparse givens to force constraint propagation.
Testing overlapping paths and coordinate math.
